title: Prishella III

'''Prishella III''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Kessel sector/Legends|Kessel sector]]. It hosted several [[Garrison/Legends|garrisons]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] team was air-dropped on Prishella III, where it [[Mission to Prishella III|kidnapped]] Imperial [[General/Legends|General]] [[Evar Orllincus]] during his inspection tour of the garrisons.

==Description==
Prishella III was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that occupied the third [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="Rules" /> in the [[Prishella system/Legends|Prishella system]], a part of the [[Kessel sector/Legends|Kessel sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Pabol Sleheyron/Legends|''Pabol Sleheyron'']], which connected it to the [[Formos system/Legends|Formos]] and [[Little Kessel system/Legends|Little Kessel systems]].<ref name="TEA" />

The planet's climate featured weather fronts that occasionally brought in [[Water/Legends|rainfall]] and thunderstorms.<ref name="Rules" /> Prishella III shared its name with the [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] known by the alias "[[Prishella (individual)|Prishella]]" as well as the
[[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[The Prishellan Dawn]]''.<ref name="Gundark">''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]''</ref>

==History==
===Plans for a kidnapping===
{{Main|Mission to Prishella III}}
[[File:Prishella-TEA.jpg|thumb|right|300px|The Rebel Alliance carried out a mission on Prishella III, in the Prishella system.]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] assigned a [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] team on a [[Mission to Prishella III|mission]] to kidnap the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[General/Legends|general]] [[Evar Orllincus]] while he was in the middle of an inspection tour of the Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrisons]] on Prishella III. The team subsequently researched the general's travel itinerary and projected transit route, as well as relevant local conditions and security arrangements. The Alliance suggested the agents utilize a specific location, located roughly midway between two of Prishella III's garrisons, for kidnapping Orllincus, although the team also identified an additional site for a potential ambush on the general.<ref name="Rules" />

Subsequently, while the [[Special forces/Legends|Special Forces]] team was preparing for its mission and waiting for its insertion starship to launch, the [[NightWhispers]], an elite [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] of [[Storm commando/Legends|Imperial storm commandos]], landed on Prishella III—unbeknownst to the [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]—and engaged in practice maneuvers throughout the planet's countryside. An undetected weather front also moved toward the area where the Rebel mission was to take place, causing severe rainfall and storms.<ref name="Rules" />

===The mission===
{{RPGseed}}
Six [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] after their mission briefing, the Special Forces agents were transported to Prishella III, where, in order to avoid detection by the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]] on the planet, they were inserted via high-altitude unpowered [[para-wing glider]] drop, which was complicated by the unexpectedly bad weather. The team landed, gathered its equipment, and regrouped, after which the Rebels made a rapid yet stealthy advance toward the ambush site, which was situated north of their position. At the same [[Time/Legends|time]], the storm [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] were on maneuvers north of the team and were moving southward on a trajectory intersecting that of the Rebels. The Alliance agents then faced a choice of either attacking the commandos or moving away from the target area in order to avoid contact with them.<ref name="Rules" />

The Special Forces team moved into position to ambush Orllincus three hours after its insertion on the planet. Successfully executing the kidnapping, the agents then withdrew to their prearranged extraction point, where they awaited the arrival of a combat [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] and [[Atmosphere/Legends|air]] support, with bad weather delaying the extraction.<ref name="Rules" />
{{Endgame}}

==Locations==
Prishella III was the site of several garrisons of the Galactic Empire. The planet also featured areas of countryside.<ref name="Rules" />

==Behind the scenes==
Prishella III was introduced in the [[1997]] sourcebook ''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]'', which was authored by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. In the book, the planet was mentioned in two examples in a section on the different ways gamemaster players could run Alliance Special Forces missions in their games. This article assumes the adventure scenario given in those examples plays out as described.<ref name="Rules" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Prishella [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Prishella III, in grid square T-10.<ref name="TEA" />
